ab: rangi maku ga Yumin lalu nya, hiya ga laqi na Tayal uziy.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Yumin，他也是泰雅族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Yumin, and he is also an Tayal child.

ab: msqun sami mqwas biru beh qalang Knyopan.
ch: 我們一起在羅浮部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Knyopan tribe.

ab: lhani sami msqun mung bnkis pqzyu squ pinqzyuwaw, baq sami balay kmayal ke Tayal kwara.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說泰雅語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Tayal proficiently.

ab: wagiq ru qthuy saku kun, Yumin ga rroq ru hikang.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Yumin很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Yumin is short and thin.

ab: mlglaw balay Yumin qasa, qsliq kwara na ssquliq.
ch: Yumin很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Yumin is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
